User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents detailed candidate profile, login credentials, and social links.

avatar.description: URL link to candidate display photo

portfolio.description: Link to custom external projects portfolio

Session.title: User Session
Session.description: Represents active session state for stateless cookie-less API tracking.

ResumeAnalysis.title: Resume Assessment
ResumeAnalysis.description: Represents a graded resume assessment output including strengths and deficiencies.

resultData.description: Highly structured AI critique breakdown payload

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp when the audit was performed

Roadmap.title: Career Roadmap
Roadmap.description: Represents interactive, staged career journey created dynamically on user parameters.

roadmapData.description: Dynamic learning stages and project blueprints payload

InterviewHistory.title: Interview History Log
InterviewHistory.description: Represents historical mock evaluations graded by AI with customized responses.

interviewType.description: The exact title prompt or question targeted

score.description: Percentage correctness grade score from 0 to 100

users/{userId}.description: Stores candidate profile configuration settings, credentials, and skills.

sessions/{tokenId}.description: Active web session tracking with short lifespan timeouts.

resumeAnalyses/{analysisId}.description: Secure parsed assessments linked to specific authenticated candidate UIDs.

roadmaps/{roadmapId}.description: Personalized career roadmaps linked directly to the creator's profile.

interviewHistories/{historyId}.description: Staged mock interview grading logs associated with authenticated users.
